Bash(cd "E:/vscode/report_agent" && python -c "
from docx import Document
import sys
doc = Document\('artifacts/draft.docx'\)
print\('paragraphs:', len\(doc.paragraphs\)\)
print\('images:', len\(doc.inline_shapes\)\)
print\(\)
for p in doc.paragraphs:
    sn = p.style.name if p.style else ''
    if sn.startswith\('Heading'\):
        lv = int\(sn.replace\('Heading ',''\)\)
        sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('  '*\(lv-1\) + '[H'+str\(lv\)+'] ' + p.text + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
    elif p.text.strip\(\):
        preview = p.text[:50]
        sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('    ' + preview + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/vscode/report_agent" && python -c "
from docx import Document
from src.doc_agent.word_rules import _heading_level, _SPEC_RE
import sys

doc = Document\('frame/实验报告模板V2025-2.docx'\)
for p in doc.paragraphs:
    if p.style and _heading_level\(p.style.name\) > 0 and '正文' in p.text:
        m = _SPEC_RE.search\(p.text\)
        sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('style=' + p.style.name + ' match=' + str\(bool\(m\)\) + ' text=' + p.text[:80] + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/vscode/report_agent" && python -c "
from docx import Document
from docx.oxml.ns import qn
import sys

doc = Document\('artifacts/final_report.docx'\)
count = 0
for p in doc.paragraphs:
    sn = p.style.name if p.style else ''
    if sn == 'Normal' and p.text.strip\(\) and count < 4:
        fonts = set\(\)
        for run in p.runs:
            rpr = run._r.find\(qn\('w:rPr'\)\)
            if rpr is not None:
                rfonts = rpr.find\(qn\('w:rFonts'\)\)
                if rfonts is not None:
                    ea = rfonts.get\(qn\('w:eastAsia'\)\)
                    asc = rfonts.get\(qn\('w:ascii'\)\)
                    if ea: fonts.add\('eastAsia='+ea\)
                    if asc: fonts.add\('ascii='+asc\)
        line = '[Normal] ' + p.text[:40] + ' | fonts: ' + str\(fonts\)
        sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\(line+'\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
        count += 1
print\('images:', len\(doc.inline_shapes\)\)
" 2>&1)

import json, sys
with open\('artifacts/report_content_schema.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    schema = json.load\(f\)
print\('格式一（IMRD结构）:'\)
fmt1 = [k for k in schema['chapters'] if k[0].isdigit\(\) and float\(k[0]\) <= 4 and '实验' in schema['chapters'][k]['title'] or '摘要' in k or '正文' in k or '致谢' in k or '参考' in k]
for k in list\(schema['chapters'].keys\(\)\)[:15]:
    v = schema['chapters'][k]
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('  ' + v['title'] + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
print\(\)
print\('格式二（传统结构）:'\)
for k in list\(schema['chapters'].keys\(\)\)[15:]:
    v = schema['chapters'][k]
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('  ' + v['title'] + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/vscode/report_agent" && python -c "
import json, sys, re
from cli_generate_md_draft import build_prompt, load_json, _is_container_chapter

schema = load_json\('artifacts/report_content_schema.json'\)
chapters = schema.get\('chapters', {}\)

print\('=== 将发送给 LLM 的章节 ==='\)
count = 0
for _, v in chapters.items\(\):
    title = \(v.get\('title'\) or ''\).strip\(\)
    desc = \(v.get\('description'\) or ''\).strip\(\)
    if _is_container_chapter\(title, desc\):
        sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('  [跳过-容器] ' + title + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
    else:
        count += 1
        sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('  [发送] ' + title + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
print\('共', count, '个章节'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/vscode/report_agent" && python -c "
import json, sys
with open\('artifacts/report_content_schema.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    schema = json.load\(f\)
for k, v in schema['chapters'].items\(\):
    title = v.get\('title',''\).strip\(\)
    desc = v.get\('description'\) or ''
    has_desc = bool\(desc.strip\(\)\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\(\('[desc]' if has_desc else '[none]'\) + ' ' + title + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/vscode/report_agent" && python -c "
import json, sys, re
from cli_generate_md_draft import _is_container_chapter

with open\('artifacts/report_content_schema.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    schema = json.load\(f\)

send, skip = [], []
for k, v in schema['chapters'].items\(\):
    title = \(v.get\('title'\) or ''\).strip\(\)
    desc = \(v.get\('description'\) or ''\).strip\(\)
    if _is_container_chapter\(title, desc\):
        skip.append\(title\)
    else:
        send.append\(title\)

sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('=== 跳过 \(' + str\(len\(skip\)\) + '\) ===\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
for t in skip:
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('  ' + t + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('=== 发送给LLM \(' + str\(len\(send\)\) + '\) ===\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
for t in send:
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('  ' + t + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
" 2>&1)
